meta.resolution_rule: ALWAYS resolve tracks/devices/parameters BY NAME at device load. LOM indices below are hints from the v4 set and WILL drift as tracks are added. Unresolved names must surface in the device UI as red text, never fail silently.
meta.note: All control is parameter-rate. Nothing in this system inserts audio processing.

buses.name: LoDrumsBus
buses.sentinel_trim: ADD: Utility named 'SENTRIM' at end of chain
buses.notes: low end anchor. Conductor never filters this bus. Sentinel may trim -2dB max.

buses.name: BassBus
buses.notes: kick sidechain glue lives here. Conductor may NOT low-pass below center; HP moves only, and only in BREATH.

buses.name: LeadsBus
buses.dj_filter_location: INSIDE the bus rack chain, not top level

dj_filter_param.polarity: negative = low-pass closes, positive = high-pass rises (VERIFY in calibration pass and correct here)

macros.name: PingPong Delay
macros.notes: inner Delay device saved drywet=0.5; macro presumably gates it. Verify rest state is silent.

macros.name: Metallica
macros.notes: unknown character. Calibrate before any move uses it.

master_fx.notes: Master FX only touches HiDrums/Perc/Pads/Leads. Master macro moves never affect bass or low drums. Design moves accordingly.

risers.name: WhiteNoise
risers.clips: 16 identical 'P-LASK Noise Generator' MIDI clips in session
risers.use: fire any clip + ramp macro; kill clip and zero macro at move end

risers.name: 42-ShephardsTone
risers.control: track volume swell (current 0.949 lin = -0.45 dB rest)
risers.use: infinite-rise illusion for long builds; swell in over n bars, out over n/2

loop_lane_rules: DISSOLVE/SWELL moves use CL track volumes ONLY. Loops fade, live playing through the same buses is untouched. Never stop/fire CL clips except in CLEAN SLATE, and CLEAN SLATE must restore all CL faders to 0 dB after stopping clips.

never_touch: any track fader except CL lanes and riser tracks
all REC FEED and Cptr tracks
Main track devices and Main fader
conductor_owns: riser track volume + KnobRiser macro + riser clips
sentinel_owns: SENTRIM utility Gain on each bus, nothing else

sentinel_targets.meter_source: output_meter_level on each bus track + Main
sentinel_targets.behavior: only trim when Main is near ceiling AND one bus has held dominant share through the attack window; release trims slowly toward 0 when headroom returns. Never boost above 0.

conductor_interface.command_track: CREATE: MIDI track named 'CONDUCTOR', no output, collapsed, placed last
conductor_interface.command_clips: empty named MIDI clips; launching one = issuing the command; device observes playing_slot_index; device stops the clip when the move completes
conductor_interface.why: zero new MIDI mappings; commands appear as labeled pads on Push 3 session grid and on both iPads; global 1-bar quantize makes every command land on the bar line

move_library.name: WASH
move_library.action: raise sends B + C on PadsBus/LeadsBus/PercBus to wet target over n bars, hold 4, return to captured values over n/2

move_library.name: TIDE OUT
move_library.action: Master Fade macro + gentle LPF over n bars to near-silence on the four FX buses, hold 2 bars, restore over n/2. Bass and low drums remain (they bypass Master FX) = the floor keeps breathing under the tide.

move_library.name: BREATH
move_library.action: LP close DJ filters on HiDrums/Perc/Pads/Leads over n/2, release over n/2. BassBus untouched. The underwater inhale.

move_library.name: BLOOM
move_library.action: start LPF closed via Master LPF macro, open over n bars while send B rises slightly, all returned at end

move_library.name: RISE
move_library.action: fire WhiteNoise clip + KnobRiser macro 0 to 1 over n bars, ShephardsTone volume swell in parallel; at bar n: kill clip, zero macro, duck ShephardsTone over 2 bars

move_library.name: DISSOLVE
move_library.action: all six CL lane volumes fade to -inf over n bars. Loops evaporate, live stays. Faders snap back to 0 dB only on CLEAN SLATE or 'DISSOLVE BACK'

move_library.name: DISSOLVE BACK
move_library.action: CL lane volumes ramp back to 0 dB over n bars

move_library.name: CLEAN SLATE
move_library.action: stop all CL clips, restore CL faders to 0, center all DJ filters, zero conductor-owned macros, release all grabs. The reset button. Executes on next bar line.

ramp_engine_rules.capture_restore: Every move captures the current value of each parameter it touches before moving it, and returns to the CAPTURED value, not an assumed default. This honors wherever Nate's hands left the Twister/XL.
ramp_engine_rules.grab_policy: live.remote~ grab only for the duration of the ramp on that parameter, release immediately at move end or CLEAN SLATE
ramp_engine_rules.curves: ambient set: default exponential-ease (slow start, slow end). No linear zipper ramps on filters.
ramp_engine_rules.rate: parameter updates at 30-60 Hz from a transport-synced clock; bar-aligned start/end via plugsync~ beat position
ramp_engine_rules.collision: one move per parameter at a time; a new move on a busy param cancels and supersedes cleanly; CLEAN SLATE supersedes everything

ritual._doc: RITUAL restore values. helix_marks is consumed by sentinel.js _ritual 'HELIX capture marks' fix. Values read directly off the gig set 2026-06-11 — Utility Gain is dB-native (confirmed in the device UI; resolves STATUS Q4, no writeTrim remap needed). eq_three_unity documents the hardcoded '6 Melodies' EQ Three fix as law (Q1); the code sets those via default_value (== unity) and is unchanged.
